titleStmt.title: SII 32, part 2, no. 62: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 62. (A.R. No. 257 of 1907.) TIRUVIḌAIMARUDŪR, KUMBHAKONAM TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the south wall, central shrine, Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple.

This inscription begins with the king's order addressed to the nāṭṭār of Tirunaṟaiyūrnāḍu as also to the elders of brahmadēyam, to the ūrs of dēvadāna, paḷḷichchandam, kaṇimuṟṟūṭṭu, veṭṭappēṟu and to nagaram in the same nāḍu. It records that Araiyaṉ Pirāntakaṉ alias Sembiyaṉ Soḻiyavaraiyar, a resident of Śiṟukuḷattūr petitioned the king, when the latter was taking food at the hall, infront of the palace of (his) mother at Paḻaiyāṟu (as follows)

In the [village] Nallāḍi in Tirunaṟaiyūr-nāḍu he had been given 1) Jīvitam and 2) he also had Janmakāṇi wherein the erstwhile tenants had been removed and in respect of which he had been paying the assessment under the veḷḷāṉvagai tenure. Excepting these two blocks of land the rest of the land in Nallāḍi had been granted as dēvadāna-iṟaiyili to the Tiruviḍaimarudūr Mahādēvar. The last category of land amounted to 15 vēli of land. The chief requested the king to make over 15 vēli of land also to him after computing that 15 vēli into 5 vēli (for the purposes of assessment) and fixing the rate payable as 120 kalam per vēli viz 600 kalam for that block. He wanted the particular land to be made as kuḍinikkā-dēvadānam and entrusted to him for enjoyment by himself and also to his progeny. He undertook to pay the 600 kalam as detailed above to the temple of Tiruviḍaimarudūr-Mahādēva. He also requested the taxes such as kāchchi, vēlikkāśu, veḷikkala viruttariśi and such antarāyakuḍimaigaḷ may not be levied in respect of this block of land. It was also stipulated that the six hundred kalam of paddy would be utilized for celebrating the festival at the temple on each of the month, coinciding with the asterism Viśākha, the natal star of the king.
Published in S.I.I., Vol. XXIII No. 257.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . koṉoṉiṉmaikoṇṭāṉ tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu nāṭṭārkkum brahmadeyak kiḻavarkkum tevatāṉa paḷḷiccantak kaṇimuṟṟūṭṭu veṭṭapeṟūrkaḷilārkkum nakaraṅkaḷilārkkum yāṇṭu 9Āvatu nāḷ 2 100 8 10- ṉāḷ paḻaiyāṟṟu nammiṭṭiluḷḷāl Ācci koyiliṉ muṉpilkūṭattu nām Uṇṭirukka ciṟu kuḷattūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ pirāntakaṉāṉa cempiyaṉ co
ḻiyavaraiyaṉ Iṉakku jivitamiṭṭa tirunaṟaiyūr nāṭṭu nallāṭi jivitam tavirntu Ivvūr muṉ kāṇi Uṭaiyārai māṟṟi Iṉakku janmakkāṇiyāka tantu muṉ veḷḷāṉvakaiyil mutalāy varukiṉṟapaṭi tavirntu tiruviṭaimarutil mahādevarkku tevatāṉa Iṟaiyilik kuṭuttu nallāṭi muṉmutalāy varukiṉṟa nilaṉ patiṉaiy veliyum mikutikkuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka vaḷai
yiṟ cuṟṟumuṟṟum muṉṟoṉṟāka maṭakki Ayveli nilamum mutalākki Inilaṉ Ayveliyālum veli nūṟṟirupatiṉ kalavaricaiyāl vanta Aṟu nūṟṟukkalamum tiruviṭaimarutil mahādevarkke Iṟuttuṇpatāka Iṉaikkum Eṉvarggattārkkum kuṭinikkātevatāṉamāy Inilattāl kācciyum velikkācum veḷikkala viruttaraciyum Ūrkaḻañcum
Uḷḷiṭṭa Antarāyakkuṭimaikaḷ tevatāṉaṅkāṇi terikkum Iṭattu Itu
teriyātitākavum yāṇṭu Āṟāvatu picāṉa mutal variyiliṭṭut tara
veṇṭum Eṉṟu namakkuc colla tirunaṟaiyūrnāṭṭu nallāṭi jivita
m tavirntu Ivvūr muṉkāṇiuṭaiyārai māṟṟi veḷḷā
ṉvakaiyil mutalāy varukiṉṟapaṭi tavirntu tiruviṭaimarutil mahā
tevarkku nam piṟanta nāḷ vicākam toṟum tiṅkaḷ tiruviḻā
c ceyya veṇṭum nivandhattukku tevatāṉa Iṟai
yiliyāka koṭuttu Innilaṉ patiṉaiy ve
liyum mikutikkuṟai
mai 2m kārāṇmai
miyācciyum Uḷḷaṭa
ṅka variyilum O
ḻiviṉṟi vaḷaiyi
l cuṟṟu muṟṟum
muṉṉoṉṟāka
maṭakki vanta nilaṉ
Ayveliyālum veli
nūṟṟirupatu kalavaricai
yāl nel Aṟunūṟṟuk ka
lamum tiruviṭaimarutil
mahādevarkke Iṟai Aṭṭi
Uṇpatāka
ciṟukuḷattūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ parāntakaṉāṉa cempiyaṉ co
ḻiyavaraiyaṉukkum Ivaṉ varggattārkkum kuṭinikkātevatāṉa
m Iṟaiiliyāka koṭuttu Inilattāl kācciyum ve
likkācum (iñcu nilam potātāka kiḻe Iḻiñcom)

cempiya
ṉ coḻiyava
raiyarkku nallāṭi . sā
danam veṭṭiyapaṭi . koyi
liṉ Attamaṇṭapattu te
ṟkil Uttarattilum Itiṉ
ṟ kiḻaiy pontu da
kṣiṇā murttikaḷ kiḻaikku
ṭattilum vetikaiyiṉ
kiḻaikaṇṭattilum paṭṭi
kaiyiṉ kiḻaikkaṇṭattilu
mitakattiṉ melaippaṭṭa
nila jālekattiṉ
melaikkuṭṭattilum maṇṭapa
ttil vetikaiyil kaṇṭat
tilum paṭṭikaiyiṉ kiḻai

k kaṇṭattilum
ṭṭi Itiṉ kuṟai
vaṭapāṭu
veṭṭiṉa Iṭam nir
māliyanir potu
m cilaiyil ve
tikaiyiṉ kiḻai
kkaṇṭattilum paṭṭi
kaiyiṉ kiḻaik ka
ṇṭattilum meṟkku
nokki cuḻalveṭi
Digital edition of SII 32, part 2, no. 62 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
